revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a single-frame 32x32 pixel-art game asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, no grid lines or borders. Canvas size exactly 32x32 pixels. Solid #FF00FF chroma-key background fills all empty space; no transparency and no gradients. Style: crisp SNES/16-bit top-down Japanese fantasy RPG field prop, low-resolution pixels, no antialiasing blur, consistent warm palette, one-pixel dark outline where useful, top-left golden-hour light.

Subject: a compact traditional Japanese watermill (suisha) connection module readable at 32x32. Left side: small thatched-roof wooden mill house, aged dark timber frame (#3a2010), warm thatched roof (#9a8040) with tiny moss/lichen pixels. Right side: a large wooden waterwheel with 6-8 paddle hints, dark wet wood, attached to the mill house and partially in a narrow stone-lined millrace channel. The millrace channel runs to the right edge to imply seamless river connection, with blue moving water and a few bright white highlight pixels where water hits paddles. Mossy stone channel edges (#6a8a5a), tiny wooden sluice gate hint near intake. Dark grounding shadows under building and along channel edges. Top-down map object, grounded at bottom edge, no isometric perspective, no vanishing point.

Composition constraints: one coherent field object only, centered and contained fully within the 32x32 frame. Leave a clear solid #FF00FF margin between the object and every canvas edge, except the water channel may visually approach the right edge as a connection cue while staying clean and pixel-readable. No detached fragments, dust specks, isolated pixel islands, seam slivers, residue, or stray pixels. Clear collision footprint. No text, no labels, no frame numbers, no UI, no watermark.

Avoid all protected-character likenesses or logos: no Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness. No samurai armor, kabuto helmet, ninja outfit, two-sword daisho, gun, modern objects, horror mood, dark gloomy palette, bird, companion creature, letter emblems, modern text, watermark, or UI.
